content: Curiosity-driven intrinsic reward mechanisms from autonomous ICM agents can be repurposed to actively curate and prioritize growing long-term memory stores for 2024–2025 state-of-the-art active learning agent memory systems, turning passive memory storage into a self-improving knowledge hierarchy. This architecture lets agents automatically retain high-uncertainty, information-dense memories that accelerate future active learning, rather than retaining all observations or relying on fixed hand-crafted retention rules.
